title: Prepare GCP and DNS deployment guide
goal: Document and optionally automate the low-cost GCP deployment and Cloudflare DNS setup.
verification: Deployment guide can be followed from a clean GCP project.
Cost-sensitive resources are explicitly called out.
Security checklist is included before launch.
notes: Added Terraform configuration under infra/gcp for VPC, subnet, static IP, e2-micro VM, firewall rules, OS Login, VM service account, backup bucket lifecycle, and optional billing budget.
Added Terraform tfvars example with Free Tier-friendly defaults.
Added GCP and DNS deployment guide covering Terraform apply, Docker installation, Compose deployment, Cloudflare DNS, Caddy HTTPS, backups, updates, and launch security checklist.
Verified Terraform formatting and validation with hashicorp/terraform:1.8.5.
